use_cases: Selecting dates for appointment scheduling in healthcare or service applications
Choosing date ranges for booking accommodations or reservations
Picking dates for event creation or calendar management in productivity tools
Setting deadlines or milestones in project management dashboards
Inputting birthdates or anniversary dates in user profile forms
ai_summary: A customizable calendar date picker component built on react-day-picker, supporting single date and range selection modes. Features month/year navigation with chevron controls and dropdown selection, responsive design with Tailwind CSS, and comprehensive accessibility support through focus states and keyboard navigation. Styled with a clean, flat aesthetic using CSS variables for theming consistency across light and dark modes.
